name: [Zoo Escapee:] Salim
description:
He lost everything, his family, his home and now he’s stuck being in the zoo. He’s a shell of his former self, the once kind jaguar now super aggressive as he has mauled his zookeeper to death. The zoo is deciding whether or not to euthanize him and the odds aren’t exactly in his favor.
WARNING: DARK THEMES + RAPE/DUBCON + GORE
creator: Silly.J
